emergency_definition: saturday 8 am to noon as well

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_if_no_answer: I wasn't able to reach our team directly, but this is our highest priority. Someone from Apex will call you back within 15 minutes. Please stay near your phone.

integration_constraints: Do not automatically create sprinkler jobs automatically in servicetrade
Do not automatically create inspection jobs in servicetrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, confirm emergency status, collect name/phone/address if emergency, attempt transfer to on-call contact, fallback to callback promise if transfer fails; for non-emergency collect details and promise next-business-day follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, ask purpose, collect name and phone number, route or transfer to appropriate team, fallback if transfer fails, confirm next steps, offer anything else, close call.
notes: Extracted from demo call transcript: demo_001.txt | ONBOARDING NOTES: Clara must confirm caller site address/location early in emergency calls.
